descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes win Western Canada Tier Two title 5-4 over Humboldt Broncos in seven-game series.
descriptionLong: The Richmond Sockeyes defeated the Humboldt Broncos 5-4 on Wednesday to capture the best-of-seven Western Canada Tier Two junior hockey title four games to three. Dave Tomlinson scored the series-winning goal with 2:37 remaining in regulation. The Sockeyes advance to the Centennial Cup tournament in Humboldt with other regional champions.
